data.title: Kelun-Biotech Approved by HKEX to Remove "B" Marker from Stock Code, Representing a New Stage of Development
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Chengdu, China, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. (known as Kelun-Biotech or the Company, ticker symbol 6990.HK) disclosed that they submitted a request to The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited under Rule 18A.12 of the Regulations.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp CarMax Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: CarMax, Inc. will unveil its Q4 earnings on April 14. Analysts predict earnings of 23 cents per share, a decline from 58 cents in the same quarter last year. Revenue for this quarter is estimated at $5.69 billion, compared to $6 billion last year. Keith Barr was recently appointed as the new president and CEO. CarMax's stock price rose by 2.2% to $44.24. For more details and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page. Check out the full story on Benzinga.com to see how accurate analysts have rated the company.

data.title: Legal-Bay Pre-Settlement Funding Announces $150MM Settlement for Albany Diocese Sex Abuse Victims
data.description: Albany Catholic Church and Tort Committee have reached a preliminary settlement, despite potential obstacles ahead. The agreement, dated April 9, 2026, in Albany, New York, is being closely monitored by Legal-Bay, a prominent litigation funding firm. The funding company has included this case in its roster of active cases, indicating the need for financial aid for plaintiffs involved.

data.title: Brandi AI Appoints Liam Darmody as Vice President of Customer Success and Go-to-Market Operations
data.description: A skilled leader in revenue generation and customer success has been appointed to drive the growth and strengthen the position of Brandi AI in the AI visibility and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) sectors. The company, based in McLean, Virginia, made this announcement on April 9, 2026. Brandi AI is known as the top intelligence-driven platform in the industry, offering a wide range of services.

Reports in Iran: 'Train operations have returned to normal Executive Deputy of Raja Rail Company: Despite enemy attacks on rail infrastructure, train operations have returned to normal. If necessary, special trains will be considered for passenger transportation.'

data.title: Hong Kong Anti-graft Watchdog: Clean Governance and Ethical Business is Key to Hong Kong's Sustainable Business Development
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Hong Kong was highlighted for its reputation as a clean, transparent, and appealing investment destination. This status has been achieved through a shared commitment to integrity by the business sector, government, and civil society. The city has established itself as a trustworthy hub for investments, with a focus on maintaining ethical standards.

data.title: SHINE Receives Conditional Commitment for $263 Million DOE Loan to Scale Domestic Medical Isotope Manufacturing Using Fusion Technology
data.description: A significant financial boost of $263 million has been secured by SHINE to aid in the finalization of Chrysalis, the largest medical isotope production facility globally. This development marks the establishment of the primary commercial source for molybdenum-99. The loan commitment received is a crucial step towards advancing this groundbreaking project, with the potential to revolutionize medical isotope production.

data.title: Avalon Healthcare Solutions Recognized as USA TODAY Top Workplace
data.description: TAMPA, Florida - Avalon Healthcare Solutions, a leading provider of Diagnostic Intelligence services for payers, is thrilled to share that they have been awarded the esteemed 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award. This recognition is bestowed upon organizations with a workforce of at least 150 employees.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties Welcomes Jennifer Carey as Irvine Office Manager
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in Irvine has appointed Jennifer Carey as the new manager of its office. With 25 years of diverse real estate expertise, including residential sales, operations, business development, and financing, Carey, an Irvine native, comes prepared for the role. Prior to this position, she held the title of Director of Sales for Orange County at a prominent local brokerage.

data.title: Euna Solutions Report Finds Public Sector Grants Teams Managing Growth Under Rising Financial and Compliance Pressure
data.description: Euna Solutions, a top supplier of specialized cloud software for the public sector, unveiled their latest report today. The 2026 State of Grants Management and Technology report delves into the responses of state and local governments in the U.S. to increasing funding needs, stricter compliance standards, and ongoing workforce shortages. The study reveals that a significant number of teams are still depending on separate systems and manual processes.
